title: Nucleic Acid Purification With Omega MagBind TotalPure NGS Beads
author: Opentrons
description: With this protocol, your robot can perform a bead clean-up of up to 96 input samples using Omega MagBind TotalPure NGS Beads.
steps_raw: With this protocol, your robot can perform a bead clean-up of up to 96 input samples using Omega MagBind TotalPure NGS Beads.
